recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: The House That Screamed
recommendations.overview: Southern France, 19th century. Teresa, a young girl, arrives at an isolated female boarding school that is tyrannically mastered by Mrs. Fourneau, the strict headmistress, whose protective shadow haunts Luis, her weak son.

recommendations.title: Queen of Spades: Through the Looking Glass
recommendations.overview: The sinister ghost of the Queen of Spades is out for blood, her victims the students of an old boarding school shrouded in gloomy rumors.  Exploring the school’s abandoned wing, the teenagers discover a mirror covered in mysterious drawings.  Facing

recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: Even the Wind Is Afraid
recommendations.overview: A group of college students, led by Claudia, decide to investigate a local tower that has figured prominently in disturbing reoccurring dreams Claudia has been having. They are suspended from school for their antics, but Claudia learns from one of th

recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
recommendations.overview: An illustrious British boarding school becomes a bloody battleground when a mysterious sinkhole appears at a nearby fracking site unleashing unspeakable horror.

recommendations.title: The Woods
recommendations.overview: In 1965 New England, a troubled girl encounters mysterious happenings in the woods surrounding an isolated girls school that she was sent to by her estranged parents.
